\tzpentry{ID4195}{Potential Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4195 introduces Potential Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} U(d) = \frac{3\mu_0\mu^2}{2\pi d^4} + U_{\text{constraint}}(d) \end{equation}
